title: Social Gamification MVP: Monthly Distance League + Leaderboard
summary: Challenge sistemi mevcut (MONTHLY_DISTANCE tipi var). Leaderboard yok. Supabase'de monthly aggregate view gerekli. Yeni screen + AppNav route gerekli.

decisions.decision: Sadece MONTHLY_DISTANCE challenge tipi MVP icin
decisions.reason: Diger tipler (WEEKLY_RIDES, SPEED_GOAL, EXPLORE_BARNS) sprint 2'ye kaliyor
decisions.impact: ChallengeType enum var, sadece UI filtreleme yeterli

decisions.decision: Leaderboard global (ilk 50 kullanici), anti-cheat: sadece ride_sessions
decisions.reason: Country-bazli filtreleme ek profil verisi gerektirir, MVP karsimastirmak istemiyoruz
decisions.impact: Supabase view WHERE is_manual = false AND duration_min >= 5

decisions.decision: leaderboard_visible opt-out user_profiles'a boolean kolonu olarak

openQuestions: ride_sessions tablosunda is_manual veya duration_min kolonu var mi?
ChallengeScreen'deki mevcut route AppNav.kt'de nasil tanimli?
nextActions: researcher: ChallengeScreen route + ViewModel + ride_sessions schema + user_profiles schema
operator: Supabase monthly_league view + leaderboard_visible migration
android-feature: LeaderboardScreen + LeaderboardViewModel + AppNav route + ChallengeScreen widget
